rationale: Candidate 84d37ea4004a2a6114aa909b0e6b6f352ef36aba is selected because it provides a high-quality translation that respects the technical tone. Candidate b566b4f6175aeffa8433c0165a2ca94be21c5e40 incorrectly modified the Gist paths to include '../' which breaks the component's logic (Gist paths should be owner/id).
